items.title: AI infrastructure teams shift spending toward inference platforms
items.contentSnippet: Cloud providers and model developers are paying closer attention to inference cost, latency and security.

items.title: Developer security tooling moves closer to the code review workflow
items.contentSnippet: New platform updates connect dependency risk, identity controls and review automation.

items.title: AI infrastructure teams shift spending toward inference platforms
items.contentSnippet: A similar report highlights how model serving economics are becoming a platform decision.

items.title: Consumer device makers add local AI controls after privacy reviews
items.contentSnippet: Device vendors are moving more inference and permission controls onto local hardware.

items.title: Central bank officials outline bank supervision priorities
items.contentSnippet: Officials emphasized liquidity monitoring, cyber resilience and market structure risks.

items.title: Inflation expectations report points to slower consumer price pressure
items.contentSnippet: Survey data suggests medium-term inflation expectations eased modestly.

items.title: Election officials publish final timeline for national vote
items.contentSnippet: The timetable clarifies registration windows, observer access and reporting checkpoints.

items.title: Security council members debate new sanctions package
items.contentSnippet: Diplomats said negotiations will continue after several amendments were proposed.
